---
title: "Terminator"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

End condition of an optical path.

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `optical_length` | float | Terminator optical length in meters, commonly zero or negligible. |
| `name` | str | Human-readable terminator name. |
| `container` | [Enclosure](Enclosure.qmd) \| None | Optional enclosure housing this terminator. |
| `termination_type` | str | Termination type, such as open, capped, angled, or mirrored. |
| `reflectance` | float \| None | Return loss or reflectance value, when known. |
| `notes` | str | Additional notes. |

## Contains

_None._

## Contained By

- [OpticalComponent](OpticalComponent.qmd)

## References

- uses [Enclosure](Enclosure.qmd)

## Referenced By

_None._
